title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Shinobu, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Luffy, Big Mom Pirates, Big Mom as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yama-O!! I'll leave momo to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: what do you mean "Is it OKay"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well......it should be okay!! Because he would naturally be m....my son

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You bastards _____!! once I slaughter all of the invaders......

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the man that ruins the fun for other people!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!!!? She's a pirate captain that's on par with kaido....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So... Does that mean we'll be fighting two kaidos!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shit!! I want to go up there too

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But now with her chasing me it's more and more enemies to fight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No no no no no no no it's futile nami!! We're dead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey you!! Choose either me or big mom!!

dialogue.speaker: King
dialogue.text: Soul King is Going into action!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you defy me I'll extinguish your soul zes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The clock? I threw it away, I'm the wind--5

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hate you!! You and I are over!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oops did I drive over something!?:?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like I drove over a flower or something

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
